raw_title: Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come
raw_content: Microsoft research lead Doug Burger introduces his new podcast series, "The Shape of Things to Come", an exploration into the fundamental truths about AI and how the technology will reshape the future. The post Trailer: The Shape of Things to Come appeared first on Microsoft Research.
generated_title: 微软研究院推出AI未来播客系列
generated_summary: 微软研究主管Doug Burger推出新播客"未来形态"，探讨AI基本原理及技术重塑未来前景。
